title: SetSw Statement
parameters:
portNumber	Integer expression representing the input bit number.

value	Integer expression with a value of 0 (Off) or 1 (On).
description: SetSw provides the ability to turn on or off one input bit.
see_also:
For Virtual IO, sets specified input bit to the specified value.

SetIn

SetInW

SetSw Example

> setsw 2, on  ' Sets the 2nd input bit to On.
examples: > setsw 2, on  ' Sets the 2nd input bit to On.
